evals.prompt: We announce this SaaS tomorrow. Audit the staging build and tell me whether we should launch. Do not submit payments or send emails.
evals.expected_output: Defines criteria and safety, tests safe journeys and operational evidence, marks forbidden paths unverified, and issues a scoped verdict.

evals.prompt: We are rolling out a risky data migration to all customers Friday. Run launch forensics on the rollout plan.
evals.expected_output: Focuses on artifact, compatibility, observability, staged deployment, rollback, and data recovery with go/no-go criteria.
